items.title: Trump Officials May Encourage Banks to Test Anthropic’s Mythos AI Model
items.summary: Reports indicate that Trump administration officials are potentially encouraging major banks to pilot Anthropic's advanced Mythos AI model, signaling a push for AI adoption in the financial sector.

items.title: OmniJigsaw: Enhancing Omni-Modal Reasoning via Modality-Orchestrated Reordering
items.summary: Researchers introduce OmniJigsaw, a novel framework that improves omni-modal reasoning by reordering and orchestrating different modalities, achieving state-of-the-art performance on complex tasks.

items.title: Apple Reportedly Testing Four Designs for Upcoming Smart Glasses
items.summary: Apple is reportedly experimenting with four distinct designs for its anticipated smart glasses, indicating significant progress in its augmented reality hardware development.

items.title: Banks Adopt First MCP Server, Nymbus Details Its AI-Powered Capabilities
items.summary: Nymbus has deployed the first Multi-Cloud Processing (MCP) server for banks, offering enhanced AI-driven financial services and operational efficiencies.

items.title: Salesmotion's MCP Server Transforms AI Assistants into Live Pipeline Analysts
items.summary: Salesmotion's new Multi-Cloud Processing (MCP) server empowers AI assistants to function as real-time pipeline analysts, providing immediate insights for sales teams.

items.title: Listen Labs Raises $69M to Scale AI Customer Interviews After Viral Stunt
items.summary: Listen Labs secured $69 million in funding following a viral billboard hiring campaign, aiming to expand its AI-powered platform for conducting customer interviews at scale.

items.title: Google Translate Now Offers Live Personal Translation via Headphones on iOS
items.summary: Google has updated its Translate app for iOS, allowing users to experience live personal translation directly through their headphones, enhancing real-time communication.

items.title: FIT: A Large-Scale Dataset for Fit-Aware Virtual Try-On
items.summary: A new large-scale dataset, FIT, has been released to advance research in fit-aware virtual try-on, enabling more realistic and accurate clothing simulations.

items.title: Graph of Skills: Dependency-Aware Structural Retrieval for Massive Agent Skills
items.summary: Researchers propose 'Graph of Skills,' a method for dependency-aware structural retrieval that enhances the management and utilization of massive AI agent skill sets.

items.title: Structured Distillation of Web Agent Capabilities Enables Generalization
items.summary: A new paper explores how structured distillation of web agent capabilities can significantly improve their generalization across diverse tasks and environments.

items.title: OpenAI Responds to Axios Developer Tool Compromise
items.summary: OpenAI has issued a statement addressing the recent compromise of an Axios developer tool, outlining its response and security measures.

items.title: Building an AI Chatbot That Learns From Human Edits (Not Just Feedback)
items.summary: A new approach focuses on developing AI chatbots that learn more effectively by incorporating direct human edits rather than solely relying on feedback mechanisms.

items.title: ViVa: A Video-Generative Value Model for Robot Reinforcement Learning
items.summary: ViVa introduces a video-generative value model designed to enhance robot reinforcement learning by predicting future states through video generation.

items.title: SIM1: Physics-Aligned Simulator as Zero-Shot Data Scaler in Deformable Worlds
items.summary: SIM1 presents a physics-aligned simulator capable of acting as a zero-shot data scaler for deformable worlds, improving data efficiency in complex simulations.

items.title: Automating Database-Native Function Code Synthesis with LLMs
items.summary: Research explores the automation of database-native function code synthesis using Large Language Models, streamlining database development and optimization.
